summary: REQ-33 requests a fresh redeploy and sharing a new working public preview URL (no HTTP 400). The diff shows multiple code/content changes (backend logic/types, frontend HTML title/marker, added deployment documentation, and large frontend feature/UI updates per the summaries), but it does not provide evidence of an actual deployment being triggered or a new preview URL being produced/shared.

missing_requirements.requirement: Trigger a fresh deployment (build + deploy) of the current UniPlace Manager application and, once deployment completes, provide a new public preview URL for the full working system (no HTTP 400).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff contains code/documentation changes but does not include any new public preview URL, nor any concrete deployment output/metadata indicating a redeploy occurred and succeeded. A guide and an HTML 'deployment marker' do not satisfy the acceptance criteria of producing and sharing a new working preview URL.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend domain model/authorization logic changes (new/expanded types like AssignmentType/GoalStatus/Goal/etc., access control state, bootstrapAdmin, role/profile queries, and other backend modifications).
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-33 is only about triggering a redeploy and sharing a new preview URL; it explicitly disallows adding/changing application features/logic beyond what is necessary for redeploy.

hallucinated_features.description: Added a deployment guide document describing deployment/redeploy steps on the Caffeine.ai platform.
hallucinated_features.reason: Documentation is not requested by REQ-33, and it does not itself trigger a redeploy or provide the new preview URL required by the acceptance criteria.

hallucinated_features.description: Frontend HTML title change and addition of a 'Deployment marker' comment.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-33 does not request any UI/content changes; these are changes to frontend output rather than evidence of an actual redeploy and new preview URL.

hallucinated_features.description: Substantial frontend feature/UI/route/hook/module changes indicated by the frontend file summaries (e.g., router/auth guards, React Query hooks overhaul, multiple admin modules, styling/branding updates).
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-33’s non-goals forbid adding or changing application features, logic, or UI beyond what is necessary to complete the redeploy; these appear to be broad feature/UI work unrelated to simply triggering a fresh deployment.

hallucinated_features.description: Project state metadata/version updates (projectStateVersion and summary content).
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-33 does not request updating project tracking metadata; also does not satisfy redeploy + new URL acceptance criteria.
